HELIOS X1 SOLAR INVERTER — TECHNICAL PRODUCT SPECIFICATION
Document Number: HX1-SPEC-2024-09 | Revision: C | Date: September 15, 2024
Manufacturer: SolarTech Industries, Austin TX 78701

=============================================================================
1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
=============================================================================

The Helios X1 is a grid-tied, single-phase string solar inverter designed for
residential and light-commercial photovoltaic (PV) installations. It features
a maximum DC input power of 6,000 watts and supports dual Maximum Power Point
Tracking (MPPT) channels, enabling the use of two independent string arrays
with different orientations or shading profiles.

Key differentiators include a 97.8% peak CEC efficiency, a built-in
consumption monitoring CT clamp, and Wi-Fi/Ethernet dual connectivity with
the SolarTech Cloud monitoring platform.

=============================================================================
2. ELECTRICAL SPECIFICATIONS
=============================================================================

2.1 DC Input (Photovoltaic Side)
  Maximum DC Input Power     : 6,000 W
  Maximum DC Input Voltage   : 600 V
  Start-up Voltage           : 100 V
  MPPT Operating Range       : 100 V – 550 V
  Number of MPPT Inputs      : 2 (independent)
  Maximum Input Current/MPPT : 15 A
  Maximum Short-Circuit Current/MPPT : 20 A
  Maximum Number of Strings  : 2 (1 per MPPT)

2.2 AC Output (Grid Side)
  Rated Output Power         : 5,000 W (5 kW)
  Maximum Apparent Power     : 5,500 VA
  Nominal AC Voltage         : 240 V (split-phase)
  AC Voltage Range           : 211 V – 264 V
  Nominal AC Frequency       : 60 Hz
  Frequency Range            : 59.3 Hz – 60.5 Hz
  Maximum Continuous Current : 20.8 A
  Power Factor               : > 0.99 at rated power
  Total Harmonic Distortion  : < 3% at rated power

2.3 Efficiency
  Peak CEC Efficiency        : 97.8%
  European Weighted Efficiency: 96.5%
  Standby Power Consumption  : < 1.2 W

=============================================================================
3. MECHANICAL AND ENVIRONMENTAL SPECIFICATIONS
=============================================================================

3.1 Physical Dimensions
  Width                      : 350 mm
  Height                     : 520 mm
  Depth                      : 185 mm
  Weight                     : 18.4 kg

3.2 Environmental Ratings
  Operating Temperature Range: -25°C to +60°C
  Humidity (non-condensing)  : 0% to 95% RH
  Ingress Protection Rating  : IP65 (fully weatherproof, outdoor rated)
  Altitude                   : Up to 2,000 m without power derating

3.3 Cooling
  Cooling Method             : Variable-speed fan + passive heatsink
  Noise Level (at 1 m)       : < 40 dB(A) during normal operation

=============================================================================
4. COMMUNICATION AND MONITORING
=============================================================================

4.1 Connectivity
  Interfaces                 : Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n, Ethernet (RJ-45)
  Communication Protocols    : Modbus TCP/IP, SunSpec, REST API
  Monitoring Platform        : SolarTech Cloud (free 10-year subscription)
  Mobile App                 : iOS 14+ and Android 10+ (SolarTech App)

4.2 Display and Indicators
  Front Panel Display        : 3.5-inch color LCD touchscreen
  LED Indicators             : Power (green), Grid Fault (red), Warning (amber)
  Real-time metrics displayed: PV power, AC power, daily yield, total yield,
                               grid voltage, grid frequency, inverter temperature

4.3 Data Logging
  Internal Memory            : 1 GB (approx. 5 years of 5-minute interval data)
  Export Formats             : CSV, JSON via REST API
  Cloud Retention            : 10 years of historical production data

=============================================================================
5. PROTECTION FEATURES
=============================================================================

  Anti-islanding Protection  : Active frequency shifting (UL 1741 compliant)
  Over/Under Voltage         : Automatic AC disconnect
  Over/Under Frequency       : Automatic AC disconnect
  DC Reverse Polarity        : Protected (no damage)
  Ground Fault Protection    : GFDI (per NEC 690.5)
  Arc Fault Circuit Interrupt: AFCI (per NEC 690.11)
  DC Switch                  : Integrated 600 V DC disconnect

=============================================================================
6. CERTIFICATIONS AND COMPLIANCE
=============================================================================

  Safety                     : UL 1741, CSA C22.2 No. 107.1
  EMC                        : FCC Part 15 Class B
  Grid Interconnect          : IEEE 1547-2018, Rule 21 (CA), Rule 14H (HI)
  RoHS Compliant             : Yes (Directive 2011/65/EU)

=============================================================================
7. WARRANTY AND SUPPORT
=============================================================================

  Standard Warranty          : 10 years parts and labor
  Extended Warranty          : Optional 15-year or 20-year plans available
  Technical Support          : 24/7 phone and email support
  Support Phone              : 1-800-SOL-TECH (1-800-765-8324)
  Support Email              : support@solartech-ind.com

=============================================================================
8. ORDERING INFORMATION
=============================================================================

  Model Number               : HX1-5K-240-US
  Replacement Parts Kit      : HX1-RPK-001
  Mounting Hardware Kit      : HX1-MHK-002
  CT Clamp (100A, split-core) : HX1-CT-100A

=============================================================================
END OF DOCUMENT — SolarTech Industries Technical Documentation Team
